name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and foldable design. Compatible with all Bluetooth devices.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with tactile brown switches, anti-ghosting technology, and durable aluminum frame. Perfect for gaming and typing.

name: USB-C Fast Charger 65W
description: GaN technology fast charger supports 65W output, compatible with laptops, phones, and tablets. Compact design with overheat protection.
